posts.author: CraftyBaker72
posts.text: Finally nailed my sourdough starter after three weeks of patience! It's been a bit of an obsession lately, but watching it bubble and smell amazing was totally worth it. Just popped the loaf in the oven now, can't wait to see if the crust cracks properly. #sourdough #baking
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about a hobby (baking) with no policy violations; it promotes a creative achievement rather than any harmful content.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.
